meaning: adj.在前的,早先的adv.在...以前 返回上一级菜单
examples: Her previous calm gave way to terror.
The car has only had one previous owner.
Previous to this, she'd always been well.
It will send these taxpayers a letter telling them to disregard the previous threatening notice.
Previous Caltech faculty members include 33 Nobel laureates and visiting professors Albert Einstein and Stephen Hawking.
